creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
At

https://www.mulesoft.com/platform/soa/mule-esb-open-source-esb

the current version is 3.8.2 and it's only available if
one registers and only valid for a 30 days trial, it does not
look like a community edition at all.

So my question: Is this submission still valid ? No response in the next two weeks allows us to close this as 'overcome by events'.
